title: Australia's first-quarter economic growth misses estimates on severe weather, weak demand
summary_full: The country's GDP expanded 2.5% in the first three months this year, compared to a year earlier, missing economists' expectations for a 2.6% growth.
summary_public: The country's GDP expanded 2.5% in the first three months this year, compared to a year earlier, missing economists' expectations for a 2.6% growth.
